resourceTemplates.name: webcrawlerapi-feed-get
resourceTemplates.title: Get WebCrawlerAPI feed
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve feed details, status, configuration, and recent runs for a specific feed.

resourceTemplates.name: webcrawlerapi-feed-json
resourceTemplates.title: Get WebCrawlerAPI JSON Feed
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve feed changes in JSON Feed 1.1 format. page defaults to 1 and page_size max is 1000.

resourceTemplates.name: webcrawlerapi-feed-rss
resourceTemplates.title: Get WebCrawlerAPI Atom feed
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve feed changes in Atom 1.0 XML format. page defaults to 1 and page_size max is 1000.
